Sheepskin Bowling Bag Small Tote
Cognac
「Warm Brown Tones, Winter Luxury Choice」

▫️ 3D Quilting|Textured finish, full retro vibes

items.name_cn:
MIUMIU Arcadie Matelassé
Sheepskin Bowling Bag Small Tote
Snow Pink
When snow pink meets classic Matelassé quilting, this bag becomes a gentle highlight for your autumn and winter wardrobe.
Like the clear pink haze of snow kissing cherry blossoms, it glows with a soft, hazy light. This sophisticated tone brightens the complexion, injecting a lingering warmth into the chilly season.
✅Fits iPhone 13 Pro
▫️Matelasse pattern
▫️Leather handle
▫️Detachable and adjustable 105cm leather shoulder strap
▫️Detachable leather mirror case
▫️Gold-tone hardware
▫️Front lacquered metal letter logo
▫️Zipper top with 2 lined pockets
▫️With studs
🔍Size:19*13*6cm
📌Model:5BB123M1200

items.name_en: 5BF131, Miu New Arrival Shell Backpack, exquisite and delicate glossy calfskin, minimalist lines combined with runway inspiration and the modern woman's temperament, balancing style experimentation and exquisite diversity. The bag has multiple wearing ways: single shoulder, handbag, crossbody, backpack, presenting a versatile retro style. Continuing Miu's unconventional, bold innovation, lazy yet natural and free-spirited style, distinct personality, capable of handling various styles, an excellent choice for work commuting or shopping.

items.name_cn:
Vintage Distressed Leather
5BB173: Miu New Size Long Handle Bowling Bag, made of ultra-soft vintage distressed lamb leather, paired with a chic accessory charm, bold innovative design perfectly interprets Miu's unconventional, free-spirited, and inclusive attitude towards life. This bag is cool, freezing a sophisticated multi-functional design, blending men's and women's elements, casual and lazy, natural and free, full of personality. It is an excellent choice for work commuting, shopping, and travel. It's popular online for a reason, loved by fashion bloggers and celebrities. Size: 28X12X8cm
